blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.1 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 112 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
